title: dasystephana calycosa
intro: Dasystephana calycosa, also known as the Mexican tea or yerba de la reina, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Dasystephana calycosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some regions.
